step_rationale: Energetic metabolite; reflects cardiomyocyte metabolic stress and myocardial ischemia but not atherothrombotic mechanism.
mechanism: Ketone bodies indicate myocardial energetic derangement and metabolic adaptation during ischemic injury.

references.title: Differential Network Analysis Reveals Metabolic Determinants Associated with Mortality in Acute Myocardial Infarction Patients and Suggests Potential Mechanisms Underlying Different Clinical Scores Used To Predict Death.
